action.reasoning: Observation: 5 epochs trained in ~110s. Val loss plateaued at 0.0219 while train loss still declining (0.0117). Pipeline works. Need to submit eval to get baseline RMSE score. Analysis: Model is overfitting - need more regularization or different approach. Decision: Submit eval now to get baseline, then improve with longer training and better architecture.
